caseViolation.violation: Hazardous Plumbing/Mechanical Equipment/Hazardous or Unsanitary Premises
caseViolation.description: Plumbing which does not conform with all applicable laws in effect at the time of installation and/or which has not been maintained in good condition and which is not free of cross connections and siphonage between fixtures. Hazardous or Mechanical Equipment. Mechanical equipment, including vents, which does not conform with all applicable laws in effect at the time of installation and/or which has been not maintained in good and safe condition and is not working properly. Hazardous or unsanitary premises. Those premises on which accumulation of weeds, vegetation, refuse, dead organic matter, debris, garbage, offal, rat harborages, stagnant water, combustible materials, and similar materials or conditions constitute fire, health or safety hazards.
caseViolation.correctiveaction: Remove the combustible materials stored next to the water heater. Do not store any items on top of or within 6" of the water heater.
